firstBlock.title: Remove the background with the photo quickly and easy!
firstBlock.subtitle: Wash the backgrounds of images for free and replace them with various backgrounds of your choice. Remove unwanted objects from photos, change the size and improve images.

descriptions.removingBackground: Wash the backgrounds of images for free and replace them with various backgrounds of your choice. Remove unwanted objects from photos, change the size and improve images.
descriptions.editingBackground: Change the image background at any of your choice. You can add new backgrounds, improve the color palette or create unique effects to create the desired mood in the photo.
descriptions.removingObjects: Easily remove unnecessary objects from photos. Take out extra details to emphasize the main thing and improve the composition of the image.

fourthBlock.title: Tariff plans
fourthBlock.subtitle: Choose the right plan for your needs and get access to easy-to-use tools to edit images and improve their quality.

termsOfUse.text:
Welcome to our service! We are glad you are with us. To make your interaction with us pleasant and safe, please familiarize yourself with our terms of use:



1. **Registration**: To access all features of our application, you need to create an account. Please provide accurate information when registering.



2. **Service use**: You agree to use our service only for lawful purposes and not to violate the rights of other users. Posting offensive or unacceptable content is prohibited.



3. **Security**: You are responsible for keeping your account information secure. Do not share your password with others and report any suspicious activity to us immediately.



4. **Changes to the rules**: We may update these rules from time to time. All changes will be posted on our website, and we recommend that you check this page periodically.



5. **Support**: If you have any questions or issues, please contact our support team. We are always ready to help!



Thank you for choosing us! We hope you enjoy using our service.
termsOfUse.title: Terms of use

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
privacyPolicy.text:
We care about your privacy and strive to protect your personal data. In this policy, we explain what data we collect, how we use it, and what measures we take to protect it.



Data Collection: We may collect information about you when you use our service, including your name, email address, and other contact information. We may also collect data about your use of our application, such as access times and the pages you visit.



- Additionally, we may collect information about your device, including device type, operating system, and browser version.



- We may also use cookies to enhance your experience by saving your preferences and settings.



Data Usage: The collected data may be used to improve our service, provide user support, and send updates about new features. We will not sell or transfer your data to third parties without your consent.



- Your data may be used to analyze trends and improve the functionality of our application.



- We may send you informational newsletters about new features and offers if you have consented to this.



Data Protection: We take reasonable measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction. However, despite our efforts, no method of data transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is completely secure.



- We use encryption to protect your data when transmitted over the Internet.



- Access to your data is restricted to those employees who need it to perform their duties.



Changes to this policy: We may update our privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on our website. We encourage you to check this page periodically to stay informed of any changes.
